summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU stuck at 99% on Morpheus devices (VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: Language update (DFU) gets stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes on Voyager 5200 Series and Voyager 8200 UC, extending total update time from 1-2 minutes to over 10 minutes
description_clean: Language update (DFU) gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes on Morpheus devices (Voyager 5200 Series and Voyager 8200 UC) before completing. The language update previously took 1-2 minutes but now takes 10 minutes or more. Expected behavior: Language update should complete within 2 minutes for Morpheus devices.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected Morpheus device (e.g., Voyager 5200 Series or Voyager 8200 UC) to open Device Settings
Go to Device Settings → Language Update (DFU)
Initiate a language update / DFU process
Observe the progress bar during the update
expected: Language update (DFU) should complete within 2 minutes for Morpheus devices (Voyager 5200 Series and Voyager 8200 UC).
actual: Language update (DFU) gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes before completing, resulting in a total update time of 10 minutes or more.
